（重要！）本次更新后已完成所有苹果4G运存与6G运存手机的适配了，从iPhone11至17都能流畅游戏！
（感谢大家这两个月的等待与支持，我们会继续努力更新内容、做好进一步的效果与优化）

第十四部大型资料片“黑榜风云”第二弹重点内容
资料片特色内容1、全新资料片“黑榜风云”
1、天下英雄谱之“黑榜”（第一期）
“一卷《天下英雄谱》横空出世，列尽武林风流人物”，天下英雄谱之“黑榜”：朔海派教主“丁老怪”、黑沙寨寨主“崔振炀”、十二连环坞当家“鹰眼老七”等黑榜高手登场：
1)解锁跌宕起伏的黑榜风云剧情，获得独特产出！
2)大侠们将有机会与他们一同修炼专属武学，培养独属于你和黑榜人物的天赋、乃至神功秘籍、绝世神兵！
3)与江湖2原有的伙伴、结义、结缘、同门的玩法深度结合，更沉浸式的体验。
4)如同天下英雄谱之“百花谱”一样，我们将以“天下英雄”为核心，逐个资料片的塑造江湖中有血有肉的各类人物（参考古龙先生对角色的塑造）



2、黑榜枭雄并起，绿林豪杰争雄！全新黑榜风云剧情玩法
1)黑沙寨裂旗扬威，十二连环坞暗流绞杀，朔海派炼狱重开！三派枭雄竞逐黑榜魁首，胜者掌生杀大权，败者尸骨无存！新增相关门派全新黑榜剧情及挑战
2)天下三大镖局风云骤起，深陷黑榜漩涡！新增三大镖局黑榜相关恩怨情仇（隐藏剧情，还请大侠自行探索）


资料片特色内容2、新武学、新特效
1)武学新增：十二卷天魔策及其对应大型奇遇探险
2)武学特效：十二卷天魔策全套特效


资料片特色内容3、全新关系与经历玩法
全新关系与经历，根据主角与NPC关系动态生成交互事件和玩法（逐步更新）：
1)主角与NPC情分值达到一定程度会触发隐藏剧情
2)主角受伤严重时会有好友前来相助
3)特殊NPC在队伍或门派中有不同的羁绊效果


资料片特色内容4、全新传闻玩法
更具有江湖味，动态传闻事件与大世界生态、时辰、诸多玩法紧密结合，更多稀有奖励与全局成就！（逐步更新）




【（重要！）暗黑江湖相关优化】
由于我们是首次尝试暗黑打宝模式，我们会根据大家的反馈持续优化刷宝体验。衷心感谢大家这些天在社区和官微群提出的宝贵体验反馈！

cn.description:
【核心特色：这就是你从未体验过的江湖】

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

cn.description:
随时随地，行侠仗义！《大侠立志传》是半瓶神仙醋开发的开放世界武侠RPG游戏。这是一款像素版江湖生存模拟器，你将扮演一个初出茅庐的市井小人物，体验多样身份，在江湖中摸爬滚打，最终脱颖而出。

【游戏特色】
- 百余种武学功法，拳掌刀剑，枪棍音律，内外兼修，皆可自行搭配。成为十字坡剑圣，亦可精通百家所长。
- 多分支走向。游戏中没有真正意义上的主线，在充满抉择的江湖中从心选择吧。
- 丰富的NPC交互玩法，结交五都侠客（侣），游走于盘杂的人际势力，经营你的江湖关系网。
- 奇遇和危险并存的真实武林。江湖并非非黑即白，遇事不一定要用拳头解决，采取多种方式应对，并坦然接受不一样的结局。
- 充满烟火气息的像素武侠世界。游戏中有着自然流逝的时间，各色NPC都有自己独立的行为AI。

cn.description:
《旋转音律》是一款活用了手机陀螺仪功能的体感音乐游戏。力求带来前所未有的崭新音乐游戏体验。
旋转手机，感受在星河间穿梭的快感。带上耳机，共赴鼓点与星光相伴的宇宙之旅。

=用体感，玩音乐=
不同于传统音游的点按式判定，在《旋转音律》中，你需要通过快速旋转手机来完成部分音符的判定——就像驾驶赛车穿越急弯那样。这将会是如同街机般爽快的音乐游戏体验。

=风格多变的音乐曲目=
众多音游知名曲师参与供稿并提供独家曲目！节奏电音、JPOP、西方歌剧、韩文流行、重金摇滚，风格多样不单调。更有丰富新曲目定期加入游戏曲库。

=梦与约定之地，爱与成长之旅=
跟随伊洛踏上宇宙之旅，追寻友人的足迹，邂逅不同星球的居民，拯救阿古亚星的命运。一路见证伊洛的成长吧！

问题反馈：rotaeno@xd.com

The original black screen camera app. No nonsense app with no silly gimmicks.

Take a photo or video with a touch of the blacked out screen.

Made for concert and festival goers

Features include:

- Discrete preview window that can be hidden
- Live photos available
- Burst mode

All settings can be uniquely set to your preferences and saved.

CovertCam v4.0.2 features:
- Single tap anywhere on screen for photo
- Swipe right to toggle video mode, then double tap anywhere on screen for video (double tap again to stop)
- Swipe left to toggle front/rear cameras
- Swipe right to toggle photo/video mode
- Press and hold (3+ seconds) for settings/removing settings menu
- Burst mode - Takes a photo every x seconds

Coming soon:
- Integration with Apple Watch

PLEASE NOTE:
In order to take video you need to be in 'video mode' - Swipe right and you toggle between photo and video mode. An indication that you are in 'video mode' will be that the view finder will slightly enlarge. Once in 'video mode' you can double tap to start the video.

It is currently not possible to auto-disable the shutter sound of the camera when taking a photo. It is against the iOS Developer Program License Agreement.

It is against iOS Developer Program License Agreement to not have indications on the screen when taking a photo and/or video.

这是一场前所未有的游戏体验，我们希望提供给您超大世界自由探索，由您选择单人或3人成行，通过策略跑团进行一场宏大的冒险体验！

这段惊心动魄的冒险，还要从法汝大陆开始，国王突遭不测，女王紧急召唤勇士们踏上命运之路，破解谜团阻止厄运，一路升级寻找真相！

【1-3人自由组队】
这场冒险支持单人或多人联机，请自由组建自己的职业流派玩法，是孤勇者？还是欢乐相声小队？看你的选择！

【多元职业】
数10种职业任你体验并发展，不同职业不同体验，非固定成长方向，玩出属于自己的套路！

【自定义配置】
通过调整混沌、昼夜、经济膨胀等冒险系统发生频率，找到适合你的游戏难度。

cn.description:
《破门而入：行动小队》是一款独具特色的2D反恐战术游戏，它将策略的深度与动作的爽快感完美结合。在游戏中，你需要指挥特警小队，在错综复杂的室内环境中直面各种致命威胁。

游戏主要体验在于：

风格迥异的作战成员：6位特警队员各自拥有专属的武器、技能与升级路线，无论是正面强攻还是隐秘行动，都能找到合适的执行者。配合超过60种枪械装备，战术组合千变万化。

拒绝线性的自由挑战：84个关卡无需按部就班，你可以根据任务情况自由选择挑战顺序。面对同一场景，亦可尝试多种通关思路，游戏没有唯一的正确答案。

持续不断的新鲜体验：完成主线任务后，“无尽高塔”模式提供了极高的随机性挑战，而“僵尸入侵”模式则让你在熟悉的战场上，用全新的方式对抗成群的僵尸。

总之，如果你渴望一款能真正让自己运筹帷幄的战术游戏，本作将是绝佳选择。

宠物对战与银河恶魔城的融合。在可爱的侧视像素世界中收集和训练怪物，并让其为你作战。

【寻找灵魂使魔，成为你最可靠的冒险伙伴】
跟随先人的步伐，成为一个怪物饲养人并拯救怪物避难所。借助收集的怪物组建团队，开展史诗般冒险，解锁不断扩张的世界。在成为终极怪物饲养人的过程中，你将揭开威胁着人类与怪物之间和平的谜团。

【探索银河恶魔城式的世界】
探索银河恶魔城式的世界。借助培养的怪物们各种专属能力，你可以在这个世界上进行探索，拓宽自己视界。砍掉树藤、撞倒墙壁、滑过间隙......在怪物的帮助下，通通不在话下。

从世界各地孵化、收集和训练怪物，组建自己的组合。每个怪物均具备独有技能树，方便定制你自己的队伍。

针锋相对，在线上玩家对战中体验雄壮的战斗，接受技巧与能力的试炼！收集并训练怪物，点满它们的技能树，一路作战，让你的怪物撑到最后！

cn.description:
===铁皮公司正版授权===

比以往任何时候都更具威胁和力量，王国保卫战5 带来了一种全新、令人兴奋的体验，以其前作的快节奏和引人入胜的玩法为基础，赢得了奖项的赞誉。

当一个强大的邪恶势力在王国上空出现时，一个意想不到的联盟形成了——发动终极塔防战役，用两支军队中最精锐的力量来保卫整个王国和领域！虽然他们暂时并肩作战，但临时联盟内部典型的纷争可能会改变后续冒险的走向。

准备好释放双英雄的强大力量，在塔防战斗中扭转战局吧！
没错，现在你可以同时控制两条龙！双倍的喷火乐趣，双倍的混乱——只要确保他们不会因为谁能囤积更多的金子争吵！

所有重量级角色如圣骑士、弓箭手、法师、死灵法师等等都听你指挥。但要注意，他们可能会开始争论谁是队伍中的真正英雄，而敌人却悄悄溜过去！ 
你准备好迎接终极对决了吗？和利尼维亚的勇敢战士们以及不屈不挠的黑暗军团，踏上征服一个巨大敌人的史诗旅程。  

游戏特色：
招募34名独特的英雄和防御塔！

- 18个精英防御塔的建造和升级
骑士顶在最前方、弓箭手百步穿杨、法师的奥术魔法、死灵法师的亡灵之力，甚至还有能召唤恶魔的深渊祭坛！——这些经典强力塔都将听从你的号令！

- 16个史诗英雄 - 将塔防战斗提升到新的水平
同时控制2名英雄去战斗！
准备见证最不可能的双英雄组合的强大威力！森林守护灵搭配钢铁傀儡？
时空法师携手“普通勇士”？看似离奇的搭档，也能爆发惊人威力！

- 6种不同地形，更有迷人的战场等你征服
保卫Kingdom Rush的多彩景观。穿越王国深林，甚至其危险的洞穴作战。

- 25个充满快节奏塔防战斗的战役阶段
在充满惊喜挑战和细节的异国地形中设定你的策略。
面对成群的不可预测的敌人和史诗般的boss战斗，将你的防御策略推向极限！

- 3种不同的游戏模式来测试你的实力
在取得胜利后，尝试以更具挑战性的方式玩每个阶段。谁不喜欢一个好的挑战呢？

- 58多个游戏成就在战斗中征服
没有诱人的奖励，史诗策略游戏算什么？展示你的技能，解锁奖励！

- 45种以上不同的敌人来测试你的塔防智慧
展现联盟的塔防战斗技能，对抗4个不同的敌人氏族。用独特的防御策略击败他们每一个！

- 当然…
有很多复活节彩蛋和Ironhide Game Studio一贯的轻松幽默。
因为没有一些隐藏的惊喜，策略游戏算什么呢？

hk.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

+ 擁有《泰坦之旅》基本版的所有玩家請注意：這裡提到的下載包還將作為附加內容發佈以供購買，以便所有粉絲可以升級他們的遊戲以充分享受所有擴展！

hk.description:
消除、戰鬥、冒險的全新進化！
Hero Emblems II是款結合『橫向卷軸』與『Match-3消除方塊』的日式角色扮演遊戲，玩家將扮演著黑夜旅團的成員，為了幫助受難的民眾而一步步踏上成為英雄的冒險旅程。


【遊戲特色】
◆爽快刺激的戰鬥消除
透過Match-3的消除規則，讓英雄們發動攻擊，還可合成魔法紋章施展強力技能，試著連續消除發動強力攻勢，擊飛眼前的敵人吧。

◆享受王道日式RPG的樂趣
在劍與魔法所構成的世界中，玩家扮演黑夜旅團一同啟程冒險，勇闖深邃的洞窟，尋找古老遺跡的神祕寶箱，途中隨時與兇惡的魔物戰鬥，到村莊添購新裝備，也順道去酒館與村民們打聽情報，體驗JRPG的遊戲魅力。

◆可替換上陣的英雄
英雄們各自有著不同背景與能力，像是人族的戰士、貂族的騎士、貓族的黑魔法師、蛙族的吟遊詩人等，依照戰鬥狀況抑或是個人喜好，安排您的英雄隊伍吧！

◆熱鬧的日文戰鬥語音
搭配英雄身分所錄製的個性化語音，讓戰鬥氣氛更顯活潑熱鬧。

◆更豐富的裝備設計
這次敵人將帶著更多元的屬性攻擊，像是中毒、燃燒、石化或詛咒等，為了對抗這些頑強的敵人，不但要裝備各式武器防具，還可配戴防止負向狀態攻擊或提升能力的飾品。

◆強化戰力的『飲食系統』
英雄的冒險旅途總是充滿各種挑戰，兇惡的魔物不但力量強大，多樣的攻擊型態總讓人措手不及，現在英雄可透過享用美食來增加能力，用更爽快的節奏來擊破魔物的攻勢吧！

◆一次付費、無內購、無廣告

黑夜旅團的新篇章
很久以前，曾經有個名為『黑夜旅團』的傭兵集團，不以賺錢營利為主，反而是四處幫助有需要的人們，在戰亂時幫助了不少受難的民眾，不過隨著和平的到來，黑夜旅團漸漸失去了舞台而不得不解散。但有四個年輕人--查克、陸斯恩、錫德與奧蒂莉亞，決定要傳承這個精神，於是再次組成了新的黑夜旅團。

在一次的任務中，查克一行人意外的拯救了一位精靈少女-多洛莉絲，獲救的精靈少女卻失去記憶，遠離精靈國度來到人族領地的舉動讓錫德產生了擔憂，但真正要讓黑夜旅團擔憂的事情才正要開始！


** 建議使用iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 第五代/iPad Pro或後續機種可以獲得更順暢的體驗**

hk.releaseNotes:
The shadows over Hue County grow darker in the wake of a shocking murder.

Step into the elegant Noir Mansion and interrogate six suspects too sharp for their own good. They'll point fingers in every direction and offer up promises of honesty. 

But you know better. Trust nothing but your clue sheet...

Could it have been Crime Reporter Scarlett with the Mini Revolver? Maybe Private Detective Mustard used the "Civil War" Musket with Bayonet? Did Risk Analyst Plum turn himself into a liability with the Billiard Stick, or perhaps Lawyer Peacock cracked with the Meat Tenderiser. Did Signature Forger White sign off Boddy's death with the Silver Candelabra? Or maybe Con Artist Green phoned in a deadly performance with the Rotary Phone... 

With the Noir Mansion crime scene, you can toggle the special Noir filter at any time during your game! See the mansion in its full-colour glory, or drench it in deep, cinematic shadows. 

You'll also unlock Noir-themed cosmetics to dress up in true vintage style!

INCLUDES:
- A BRAND-NEW CRIME SCENE – The highly requested film-noir theme arrives in Clue/Cluedo!
- THEMED COSMETICS – This crime scene includes a new player avatar, a different card back, a themed clue sheet, a sleek dice set and 12 new tokens.
- MORE STORY TO EXPLORE – Delve into the murky backstories of each suspect and uncover their motives.
hk.description:
Join fellow detectives all over the world in the official digital board game version of Clue/Cluedo! Gather crucial evidence, interrogate suspects and solve the original murder mystery.

Follow Miss Scarlett, Colonel Mustard, Professor Plum, Chef White, Solicitor Peacock and Mayor Green through the iconic Tudor Mansion, unlocking their motives and alibis as you go. 

Enjoy Clue/Cluedo the way you remember it in Classic Mode, or jump in for a quick game with Clue Cards mode. Alternatively, if you want to really test your sleuthing skills, try a new investigation format available exclusively to Clue/Cluedo – Ultimate Detective.

In Ultimate Detective Mode, everyone answers suggestions at the same time…but secretly! 

Face your suspects in a direct interrogation as you rely on your skills of deduction to get to the truth. Experience the mystery, solve the murder and become a top-tier detective!

HOW TO PLAY CLUE/CLUEDO: 

1. Three cards are dealt face-down and set aside – this is the solution to the crime!
2. Everyone is dealt three Clue Cards. These are automatically crossed off your clue sheet, as they can’t be part of the solution. 
3. Roll the dice and move around the board. 
4. When you enter a room, you can make a suggestion – select who you think the murderer is, what weapon they used and where the crime happened. 
5. Other players will then aim to disprove your suggestion; if one of your suggestions matches a card in their hand, they show you that card to disprove it. 
6. Use your clue sheet to keep track of which characters, weapons and rooms have been disproven. 
7. Think you’ve figured it out? It’s time to make an accusation! Be careful though – if you’re right, you win, but if you are wrong, you’re out! 

FEATURES

- THE CLASSIC TUDOR MANSION – Play the beloved original board game, now rendered in stunning 3D animation and entirely ad-free! 
- A BRAND-NEW GAME MODE – Exclusive to the digital version of Clue/Cluedo, Ultimate Detective Mode lets you interrogate multiple characters at once.
- MULTIPLE MODES – Compete against cutting-edge AI opponents that adapt to your skill level for the perfect game, or challenge detectives around the world. 
- ADDITIONAL ORIGINAL CONTENT – What happened after the shocking events of Tudor Mansion? Find out in a series of original new crime scenes designed specifically for the digital version of Clue/Cluedo! New characters emerge, bringing with them new clues, motives and case files to consider as you travel around the world in search of the truth. 

Sharpen your mind with the iconic murder-mystery board game, now available on mobile!

【漢末霸業】基本介紹

【三國誌:漢末霸業】是由成都龍遊天下工作室精心制作的壹款回合制君主扮演模式的SLG遊戲。主要是以國人自己對三國遊戲的新思維，新角度來打造不壹樣的三國世界。在回歸傳統策略類的基礎上深度刻畫了三國各城市之間的地域差異以及每個武將自身能力和特性的異同，而在戰鬥方面突出結合天時地利人和的調配來進行作戰的魅力。


正式版遊戲特色：
壹：經典的白描繡像畫風，古樸典雅
人物頭像采用經典的《三國演義》連環畫的白描繡像畫風和上色。遊戲界面采用古風古韻設計，地道中國風。
二：簡單易上手的政務管理模式：
基礎的內政安排、人事探索、軍事偵察、技術開發都采用放置類管理模式，減少繁瑣的重復操作，讓玩家能聚焦其他事件。君主扮演模式，玩家只需要關註首都以及國家的管理。其他城市交給太守進行管理。使用方針給分城下達不同的軍政指令。

三：極其豐富的遊戲內容設定：
	超過1300名登場武將（包括歷史和演義武將）。 
	30項武將基本能力的細分化設計，更能體現武將之間的差異。
	超過300種以上的獨立配置的武將特性，全面凸顯武將個體差異。 
	超過500種有考據的物品寶物設定。多種分類劃分來滿足不同的喜好需求。
	近六十多個不同類型的城市，200多種有據可考的城市特征和特產。
	豐富的技術研究和開發項目，體現了科技對勢力發展的重要性。
	三大基本兵種和近二十種特殊兵種構成豐富的兵種體系。
	超豐富的官職系統。
	各種自然現象和事件災害模擬出多災多難的三國時期。 
	豐富的來訪事情，商人、仙人、名士、名醫、名匠、劍客遊走四方，引發各種功能事件。

四：回歸經典回合制，側重策略性排兵布陣的戰鬥系統
	天氣和地形、地塊高度的引入更加凸顯天時地利要素對戰爭的影響。
	野戰和攻城戰功能獨立分開。攻城有攻城車，霹靂車，井闌，守城有投石機、床弩、塞門刀車。更能凸顯攻守之間的平衡關系。

hk.description:
Inspect papers, prevent smuggling—keep the border safe or profit from corruption.

Ready to become a Border Police Officer? Step into the world of Black Border 2: Border Patrol Simulator and experience the intense pressure of national security. As a Customs Officer, your duty is to protect the nation from illegal smuggling. Inspect passports, scrutinize documents, and use advanced tools to make life-or-death decisions in this gripping police simulator game.

Take on the duty of a Border Patrol Agent and protect your nation's borders. Your role is crucial:

Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports, permits, and papers to approve or reject entrants.

Advanced Tools: Utilize X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and weigh stations to check vehicle legitimacy.

Canine Unit: Deploy your loyal service dog to sniff out concealed contraband and uncover secrets.

Strategic Decisions: Every choice you make impacts the safety of your country.

NEW FEATURES in Black Border 2:

Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports and permits to approve or reject entrants as a customs officer.

Endless Mode: Test your border patrol skills in a nonstop, challenging experience.

Bus Arrivals: Manage large buses and check every passenger's documents carefully.

Advanced Scanning: Utilize new X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and contraband.

Weigh Stations: Ensure vehicle weights match their records, a key part of your police duty.

Canine Unit: Your faithful service dog is now a crucial partner in finding hidden contraband.

Each day as a border inspector brings new challenges that will push your customs police skills to the limit. Are you ready to face the pressure and become a true hero of national security?

Download Black Border 2 today and get ready to defend the nation!

hk.description:
BimmerLink is the direct link to your BMW or MINI. Using one of the supported OBD adapters, you can read trouble codes or display sensor values in realtime, check the current state of the DPF in your car or register a new battery after replacement. BimmerLink even allows you to remotely control the exhaust flap or mute the Active Sound Design in your car.

READ AND CLEAR TROUBLE CODES
Diagnose your car as would otherwise be possible only by your Service Partner. In contrast to generic OBD apps that read emission related errors only, BimmerLink allows you to read and clear trouble codes from ALL control units in your car.

DISPLAY REALTIME SENSOR VALUES
BimmerLink provides a big selection of values like oil temperature or boost pressure. Keep an eye on all the important parameters of your car with a personalized dashboard.

EXHAUST FLAP REMOTE CONTROL*
Take control over the exhaust flap in your car and decide yourself, whether it should be closed or open.

ACTIVE SOUND DESIGN**
If you do not like the artificial engine sound generated in your car, just mute the Active Sound Design with BimmerLink.

SOUND TUNING***
The “Sound Tuning” option allows you to disable the “exhaust burble“ in cars equipped with the S55 engine (M2 Competition, M3, M4).

DPF REGENERATION****
BimmerLink allows you to check the current state of the diesel particulate filter in your car. Find out when the last regeneration took place or how much ash has accumulated in the filter and start a regeneration with the touch of a button.

CARPLAY ADD-ON*****
Enhance your driving experience with the CarPlay add-on for BimmerLink. Access your sensor values on your car's display for improved vehicle monitoring, all integrated seamlessly with CarPlay for ease of use.

BATTERY REGISTRATION
If you want to replace the battery in your car, this has to be registered in the engine control unit and BimmerLink allows you to do this yourself now.

PARKING BRAKE SERVICE MODE
BimmerLink allows you to activate the service mode for the electromechanical parking brake.

SERVICE RESET
Reset the service display in your car after carrying out maintenance work like a brake pad replacement or an engine oil change.

RESET SHORT CIRCUIT LOCKS
Unlock lamp outputs that were disabled due to a short circuit.

TRANSMISSION ADAPTATION VALUES
Check the adaptation values of the ZF 8HP automatic transmission in your vehicle.

REQUIRED ACCESSORIES
To use the app, one of the supported Bluetooth or WiFi OBD adapters or cables is required. For more information please visit https://bimmerlink.app.

SUPPORTED CARS
- 1 Series (2004+)
- 2 Series, M2 (2013+)
- 2 Series Active Tourer (2014+)
- 2 Series Gran Tourer (2015+)

** Only for cars that are equipped with the “Active Sound Design“ by factory.

**** Only for cars with a diesel engine.

hk.description:
让自己沉浸在《沙丘》的世界中。
在屡获殊荣的棋盘游戏《沙丘：帝国》中，穿梭于地形险恶的厄拉科斯星球，体验策略与阴谋的终极融合！
"在线对战、与人工智能进行本地对战，或与强大的哈葛尔家族对战。
获得成就，展示你作为领袖的实力。
面对十数种挑战，考验你的智慧和狡黠。
在轮换的遭遇战模式中争夺徽章，每场比赛都不尽相同！"
控制香料，就是控制宇宙。
厄拉科斯、沙丘、沙漠星球。在面前的广袤荒原上高举你的旗帜。当立法会各大家族调集军队和间谍时，你将影响谁，又将背叛谁？暴虐的皇帝、神秘的贝尼·杰瑟里特、精明的宇航公会、沙漠深处凶残的弗雷曼人。帝国的力量可以属于你，但战争并不是夺取力量的唯一途径。
《沙丘：帝国》是一款主题鲜明的全新战略游戏，融合了牌组搭建和工人放置的元素，将帝国的命运掌握在你手中。你会寻求政治盟友还是依靠军事力量？靠经济实力还是耍阴谋诡计？让议会席位决定……还是亮出锋利的刀刃？拿好手牌，决定在你手中，帝国正在等待。

hk.description:
在这款备受赞誉的策略桌游中，规划并建设一座科学管理的现代化动物园，为保护项目提供支持。

你将在《Ark Nova》中规划和设计一座科学管理的现代化动物园。并向着“拥有最成功的动物园”的终极目标努力奋斗。你将建造饲养区、容纳动物并支持世界各地的保护项目，专家们和各种独特建筑将帮助你实现这一目标。

《Ark Nova》的核心要素是 255 张以动物、专家、独特饲养区与保护项目为主题的卡牌。每张卡牌都拥有特定能力，你可以利用它们来提高动物园的魅力和科学声望并收集保护点数。每位玩家都有一组行动卡牌，你可以通过使用和升级这些卡牌来实施你的计划。

每位玩家都可以使用一套五张行动卡牌来进行游戏，行动的强度由卡牌当前占据的槽位决定。这些卡牌是：

建造：允许你建造标准/特殊饲养区、贩售亭与休憩亭。

动物：允许你在自己的动物园中容纳动物。

卡牌：允许你获得新动物园卡牌（动物、赞助商以及保护项目卡牌）。

协会：允许你的协会事务员完成不同任务。

赞助商：允许你在自己的动物园中打出一张赞助商卡牌或获得钱币。

《Ark Nova》拥有极高的可玩性和丰富的组件，可提供不同凡响的游戏体验，让玩家无数次体验游戏的乐趣。

hk.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

hk.description:

《召喚騎士團》是由橄欖熊貓工作室製作的一款RPG卡牌像素風遊戲。 分為《騎士之歌》和《群星之章》兩部分玩法和內容，遊戲將透過「10TWD付費下載，內購解鎖」的方式取得全部的遊玩內容。

【內購解鎖】
全內容解鎖：8.99USD
騎士之歌劇情模式：4.99USD
群星之章自由模式：4.99USD
兩個模式都支持先體驗再付費解鎖，《騎士之歌》可以免費體驗至第二章節結束，《群星之章》免費體驗遊戲內時間一年。
PS：該金額會根據當地匯率進行換算

《騎士之歌》：
劇情改編自諾貝爾文學獎得主亨里克·顯克微支《十字軍騎士》，主要玩法為卡牌的RPG角色扮演，在卡牌戰鬥的同時加入了夥伴技能連攜系統，將根據玩家打出 的牌釋放不同的專屬技能，從而建構不同的流派。 在遊戲中也會認識並招募到眾多同伴，踏上一段波瀾壯闊的旅程。

《群星之章》：
遊戲的主舞台在一個名為安塔納的魔幻大陸上，在這裡擁有風俗迥異的六個國家，玩家將扮演其中一個王國的小領主。
在魔界即將入侵這片大陸的前夕，玩家需要前往各地尋找自己騎士團的伙伴，建立屬於自己的騎士團，展開冒險，增強自己的實力，守護人類戰線。

遊戲過程中需要協助，或遇到問題，可以通過郵件聯絡反饋。

mo.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

+ 擁有《泰坦之旅》基本版的所有玩家請注意：這裡提到的下載包還將作為附加內容發佈以供購買，以便所有粉絲可以升級他們的遊戲以充分享受所有擴展！

消除、戰鬥、冒險的全新進化！
Hero Emblems II是款結合『橫向卷軸』與『Match-3消除方塊』的日式角色扮演遊戲，玩家將扮演著黑夜旅團的成員，為了幫助受難的民眾而一步步踏上成為英雄的冒險旅程。


【遊戲特色】
◆爽快刺激的戰鬥消除
透過Match-3的消除規則，讓英雄們發動攻擊，還可合成魔法紋章施展強力技能，試著連續消除發動強力攻勢，擊飛眼前的敵人吧。

◆享受王道日式RPG的樂趣
在劍與魔法所構成的世界中，玩家扮演黑夜旅團一同啟程冒險，勇闖深邃的洞窟，尋找古老遺跡的神祕寶箱，途中隨時與兇惡的魔物戰鬥，到村莊添購新裝備，也順道去酒館與村民們打聽情報，體驗JRPG的遊戲魅力。

◆可替換上陣的英雄
英雄們各自有著不同背景與能力，像是人族的戰士、貂族的騎士、貓族的黑魔法師、蛙族的吟遊詩人等，依照戰鬥狀況抑或是個人喜好，安排您的英雄隊伍吧！

◆熱鬧的日文戰鬥語音
搭配英雄身分所錄製的個性化語音，讓戰鬥氣氛更顯活潑熱鬧。

◆更豐富的裝備設計
這次敵人將帶著更多元的屬性攻擊，像是中毒、燃燒、石化或詛咒等，為了對抗這些頑強的敵人，不但要裝備各式武器防具，還可配戴防止負向狀態攻擊或提升能力的飾品。

◆強化戰力的『飲食系統』
英雄的冒險旅途總是充滿各種挑戰，兇惡的魔物不但力量強大，多樣的攻擊型態總讓人措手不及，現在英雄可透過享用美食來增加能力，用更爽快的節奏來擊破魔物的攻勢吧！

◆一次付費、無內購、無廣告

黑夜旅團的新篇章
很久以前，曾經有個名為『黑夜旅團』的傭兵集團，不以賺錢營利為主，反而是四處幫助有需要的人們，在戰亂時幫助了不少受難的民眾，不過隨著和平的到來，黑夜旅團漸漸失去了舞台而不得不解散。但有四個年輕人--查克、陸斯恩、錫德與奧蒂莉亞，決定要傳承這個精神，於是再次組成了新的黑夜旅團。

在一次的任務中，查克一行人意外的拯救了一位精靈少女-多洛莉絲，獲救的精靈少女卻失去記憶，遠離精靈國度來到人族領地的舉動讓錫德產生了擔憂，但真正要讓黑夜旅團擔憂的事情才正要開始！


** 建議使用iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 第五代/iPad Pro或後續機種可以獲得更順暢的體驗**

官方微博：
http://weibo.com/longyougame
遊俠網合作論壇：
http://game.ali213.net/forum-1723-1.html
QQ群: 293787531   795489685
Facebook: 搜索 三國誌漢末霸業

【漢末霸業】基本介紹

【三國誌:漢末霸業】是由成都龍遊天下工作室精心制作的壹款回合制君主扮演模式的SLG遊戲。主要是以國人自己對三國遊戲的新思維，新角度來打造不壹樣的三國世界。在回歸傳統策略類的基礎上深度刻畫了三國各城市之間的地域差異以及每個武將自身能力和特性的異同，而在戰鬥方面突出結合天時地利人和的調配來進行作戰的魅力。


正式版遊戲特色：
壹：經典的白描繡像畫風，古樸典雅
人物頭像采用經典的《三國演義》連環畫的白描繡像畫風和上色。遊戲界面采用古風古韻設計，地道中國風。
二：簡單易上手的政務管理模式：
基礎的內政安排、人事探索、軍事偵察、技術開發都采用放置類管理模式，減少繁瑣的重復操作，讓玩家能聚焦其他事件。君主扮演模式，玩家只需要關註首都以及國家的管理。其他城市交給太守進行管理。使用方針給分城下達不同的軍政指令。

三：極其豐富的遊戲內容設定：
	超過1300名登場武將（包括歷史和演義武將）。 
	30項武將基本能力的細分化設計，更能體現武將之間的差異。
	超過300種以上的獨立配置的武將特性，全面凸顯武將個體差異。 
	超過500種有考據的物品寶物設定。多種分類劃分來滿足不同的喜好需求。
	近六十多個不同類型的城市，200多種有據可考的城市特征和特產。
	豐富的技術研究和開發項目，體現了科技對勢力發展的重要性。
	三大基本兵種和近二十種特殊兵種構成豐富的兵種體系。
	超豐富的官職系統。
	各種自然現象和事件災害模擬出多災多難的三國時期。 
	豐富的來訪事情，商人、仙人、名士、名醫、名匠、劍客遊走四方，引發各種功能事件。

四：回歸經典回合制，側重策略性排兵布陣的戰鬥系統
	天氣和地形、地塊高度的引入更加凸顯天時地利要素對戰爭的影響。
	野戰和攻城戰功能獨立分開。攻城有攻城車，霹靂車，井闌，守城有投石機、床弩、塞門刀車。更能凸顯攻守之間的平衡關系。

BimmerLink is the direct link to your BMW or MINI. Using one of the supported OBD adapters, you can read trouble codes or display sensor values in realtime, check the current state of the DPF in your car or register a new battery after replacement. BimmerLink even allows you to remotely control the exhaust flap or mute the Active Sound Design in your car.

READ AND CLEAR TROUBLE CODES
Diagnose your car as would otherwise be possible only by your Service Partner. In contrast to generic OBD apps that read emission related errors only, BimmerLink allows you to read and clear trouble codes from ALL control units in your car.

DISPLAY REALTIME SENSOR VALUES
BimmerLink provides a big selection of values like oil temperature or boost pressure. Keep an eye on all the important parameters of your car with a personalized dashboard.

EXHAUST FLAP REMOTE CONTROL*
Take control over the exhaust flap in your car and decide yourself, whether it should be closed or open.

ACTIVE SOUND DESIGN**
If you do not like the artificial engine sound generated in your car, just mute the Active Sound Design with BimmerLink.

SOUND TUNING***
The “Sound Tuning” option allows you to disable the “exhaust burble“ in cars equipped with the S55 engine (M2 Competition, M3, M4).

DPF REGENERATION****
BimmerLink allows you to check the current state of the diesel particulate filter in your car. Find out when the last regeneration took place or how much ash has accumulated in the filter and start a regeneration with the touch of a button.

CARPLAY ADD-ON*****
Enhance your driving experience with the CarPlay add-on for BimmerLink. Access your sensor values on your car's display for improved vehicle monitoring, all integrated seamlessly with CarPlay for ease of use.

BATTERY REGISTRATION
If you want to replace the battery in your car, this has to be registered in the engine control unit and BimmerLink allows you to do this yourself now.

PARKING BRAKE SERVICE MODE
BimmerLink allows you to activate the service mode for the electromechanical parking brake.

SERVICE RESET
Reset the service display in your car after carrying out maintenance work like a brake pad replacement or an engine oil change.

RESET SHORT CIRCUIT LOCKS
Unlock lamp outputs that were disabled due to a short circuit.

TRANSMISSION ADAPTATION VALUES
Check the adaptation values of the ZF 8HP automatic transmission in your vehicle.

REQUIRED ACCESSORIES
To use the app, one of the supported Bluetooth or WiFi OBD adapters or cables is required. For more information please visit https://bimmerlink.app.

SUPPORTED CARS
- 1 Series (2004+)
- 2 Series, M2 (2013+)

- 2 Series Gran Tourer (2015+)
- 3 Series, M3 (2005+)

** Only for cars that are equipped with the “Active Sound Design“ by factory.

让自己沉浸在《沙丘》的世界中。
在屡获殊荣的棋盘游戏《沙丘：帝国》中，穿梭于地形险恶的厄拉科斯星球，体验策略与阴谋的终极融合！
"在线对战、与人工智能进行本地对战，或与强大的哈葛尔家族对战。
获得成就，展示你作为领袖的实力。
面对十数种挑战，考验你的智慧和狡黠。
在轮换的遭遇战模式中争夺徽章，每场比赛都不尽相同！"
控制香料，就是控制宇宙。
厄拉科斯、沙丘、沙漠星球。在面前的广袤荒原上高举你的旗帜。当立法会各大家族调集军队和间谍时，你将影响谁，又将背叛谁？暴虐的皇帝、神秘的贝尼·杰瑟里特、精明的宇航公会、沙漠深处凶残的弗雷曼人。帝国的力量可以属于你，但战争并不是夺取力量的唯一途径。
《沙丘：帝国》是一款主题鲜明的全新战略游戏，融合了牌组搭建和工人放置的元素，将帝国的命运掌握在你手中。你会寻求政治盟友还是依靠军事力量？靠经济实力还是耍阴谋诡计？让议会席位决定……还是亮出锋利的刀刃？拿好手牌，决定在你手中，帝国正在等待。

mo.description:
在这款备受赞誉的策略桌游中，规划并建设一座科学管理的现代化动物园，为保护项目提供支持。

你将在《Ark Nova》中规划和设计一座科学管理的现代化动物园。并向着“拥有最成功的动物园”的终极目标努力奋斗。你将建造饲养区、容纳动物并支持世界各地的保护项目，专家们和各种独特建筑将帮助你实现这一目标。

《Ark Nova》的核心要素是 255 张以动物、专家、独特饲养区与保护项目为主题的卡牌。每张卡牌都拥有特定能力，你可以利用它们来提高动物园的魅力和科学声望并收集保护点数。每位玩家都有一组行动卡牌，你可以通过使用和升级这些卡牌来实施你的计划。

每位玩家都可以使用一套五张行动卡牌来进行游戏，行动的强度由卡牌当前占据的槽位决定。这些卡牌是：

建造：允许你建造标准/特殊饲养区、贩售亭与休憩亭。

动物：允许你在自己的动物园中容纳动物。

卡牌：允许你获得新动物园卡牌（动物、赞助商以及保护项目卡牌）。

协会：允许你的协会事务员完成不同任务。

赞助商：允许你在自己的动物园中打出一张赞助商卡牌或获得钱币。

《Ark Nova》拥有极高的可玩性和丰富的组件，可提供不同凡响的游戏体验，让玩家无数次体验游戏的乐趣。

mo.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

【漢末霸業】基本介紹

【三國誌:漢末霸業】是由成都龍遊天下工作室精心制作的壹款回合制君主扮演模式的SLG遊戲。主要是以國人自己對三國遊戲的新思維，新角度來打造不壹樣的三國世界。在回歸傳統策略類的基礎上深度刻畫了三國各城市之間的地域差異以及每個武將自身能力和特性的異同，而在戰鬥方面突出結合天時地利人和的調配來進行作戰的魅力。


正式版遊戲特色：
壹：經典的白描繡像畫風，古樸典雅
人物頭像采用經典的《三國演義》連環畫的白描繡像畫風和上色。遊戲界面采用古風古韻設計，地道中國風。
二：簡單易上手的政務管理模式：
基礎的內政安排、人事探索、軍事偵察、技術開發都采用放置類管理模式，減少繁瑣的重復操作，讓玩家能聚焦其他事件。君主扮演模式，玩家只需要關註首都以及國家的管理。其他城市交給太守進行管理。使用方針給分城下達不同的軍政指令。

三：極其豐富的遊戲內容設定：
	超過1300名登場武將（包括歷史和演義武將）。 
	30項武將基本能力的細分化設計，更能體現武將之間的差異。
	超過300種以上的獨立配置的武將特性，全面凸顯武將個體差異。 
	超過500種有考據的物品寶物設定。多種分類劃分來滿足不同的喜好需求。
	近六十多個不同類型的城市，200多種有據可考的城市特征和特產。
	豐富的技術研究和開發項目，體現了科技對勢力發展的重要性。
	三大基本兵種和近二十種特殊兵種構成豐富的兵種體系。
	超豐富的官職系統。
	各種自然現象和事件災害模擬出多災多難的三國時期。 
	豐富的來訪事情，商人、仙人、名士、名醫、名匠、劍客遊走四方，引發各種功能事件。

四：回歸經典回合制，側重策略性排兵布陣的戰鬥系統
	天氣和地形、地塊高度的引入更加凸顯天時地利要素對戰爭的影響。
	野戰和攻城戰功能獨立分開。攻城有攻城車，霹靂車，井闌，守城有投石機、床弩、塞門刀車。更能凸顯攻守之間的平衡關系。

tw.description:
自2006年首次亮相以來，《泰坦之旅》吸引了眾多玩家。在《泰坦之旅》世界中，你將在無拘無束的英雄之旅中獲得全方位的體驗！

你的光榮任務是拯救世界！

單靠諸神無法打敗泰坦，所以需要真正的英雄 - 那就是你！你的成功或失敗將決定人類和奧林匹斯山諸神的命運！與你的定制英雄一起，探索希臘、埃及、巴比倫和中國的神秘、遠古世界。征服成群的傳奇生物，掌握各種武器和武術：射箭、劍術或使用強大的魔法！

遊歷古代和北歐神話世界！

當你旅行前往派特農神廟、大金字塔、巴比倫空中花園、長城、塔耳塔洛斯競技場和其他著名景點時，與神話中的野獸戰鬥。遭遇希臘神話中的最大惡棍，探索北歐未知的土地，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國，然後踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程。

在你的光榮道路上，要麼全部得到，要麼一無所有！

每一個挑戰等待著你，你必須擊敗更大更強的敵人，直到達到目標並迫使泰坦屈服！與勇敢的寵物同伴一起投入戰鬥！尋找具有特殊力量的非凡物品，這些物品將增強你的能力，幫助你前進。傳奇之劍、強大的閃電咒語、魔法、弓箭以及力量超乎想像的無數其他寶藏等待著你 - 它們全都可以在你的戰鬥中使用，在可怕的生物中散佈驚駭和恐懼！

你在等什麼？

不同於其他動作角色扮演遊戲，《泰坦之旅：傳奇版》將迷人的神話世界與無盡而刺激的動作融合在一起，正如你對如此引人入勝的遊戲所期待的！

主要特點：

- 在不朽王座下載包的世界中，你將遇到希臘神話中的最大惡棍，勇敢面對地獄犬的攻擊，危害冥河的河岸。你需要解釋盲人提爾西亞斯的預言，與阿伽門農和阿喀琉斯並肩作戰，用奧德修斯的計策征服這個黑暗的新冒險。

- 在諸神黃昏下載包的北歐未知土地上，你將勇敢面對凱爾特人、諾斯曼人和阿斯加迪神靈的領地！

- 在亞特蘭蒂斯下載包，與探險家會面，尋找神話中的亞特蘭蒂斯王國。據說有一把鑰匙藏在伊拉克利翁的日記中，該日記據傳位於腓尼基城市加迪爾。踏上穿越地中海西部的旅程，包括塔耳塔洛斯競技場，進行史詩般的戰鬥！

+ 經過全面技術修改的《泰坦之旅》實施了所有的重要更新，以賦予這部經典之作最佳的遊戲體驗！

在永恆餘燼DLC可在應用內購買的 中殺死巨巫泰肯之後，英雄受到傳說中的堯帝召喚，回到東方著手對付一直肆虐 這片大陸的邪魔威脅。 在追查過程中，英雄和他的同伴們發現，遠古兇獸窮奇的現身並非只是巧合，必定有兇險萬分的陰謀正在醞釀…

+ 擁有《泰坦之旅》基本版的所有玩家請注意：這裡提到的下載包還將作為附加內容發佈以供購買，以便所有粉絲可以升級他們的遊戲以充分享受所有擴展！

【遊戲特色】
◆爽快刺激的戰鬥消除
透過Match-3的消除規則，讓英雄們發動攻擊，還可合成魔法紋章施展強力技能，試著連續消除發動強力攻勢，擊飛眼前的敵人吧。

◆享受王道日式RPG的樂趣
在劍與魔法所構成的世界中，玩家扮演黑夜旅團一同啟程冒險，勇闖深邃的洞窟，尋找古老遺跡的神祕寶箱，途中隨時與兇惡的魔物戰鬥，到村莊添購新裝備，也順道去酒館與村民們打聽情報，體驗JRPG的遊戲魅力。

◆可替換上陣的英雄
英雄們各自有著不同背景與能力，像是人族的戰士、貂族的騎士、貓族的黑魔法師、蛙族的吟遊詩人等，依照戰鬥狀況抑或是個人喜好，安排您的英雄隊伍吧！

◆熱鬧的日文戰鬥語音
搭配英雄身分所錄製的個性化語音，讓戰鬥氣氛更顯活潑熱鬧。

◆更豐富的裝備設計
這次敵人將帶著更多元的屬性攻擊，像是中毒、燃燒、石化或詛咒等，為了對抗這些頑強的敵人，不但要裝備各式武器防具，還可配戴防止負向狀態攻擊或提升能力的飾品。

◆強化戰力的『飲食系統』
英雄的冒險旅途總是充滿各種挑戰，兇惡的魔物不但力量強大，多樣的攻擊型態總讓人措手不及，現在英雄可透過享用美食來增加能力，用更爽快的節奏來擊破魔物的攻勢吧！

◆一次付費、無內購、無廣告

黑夜旅團的新篇章
很久以前，曾經有個名為『黑夜旅團』的傭兵集團，不以賺錢營利為主，反而是四處幫助有需要的人們，在戰亂時幫助了不少受難的民眾，不過隨著和平的到來，黑夜旅團漸漸失去了舞台而不得不解散。但有四個年輕人--查克、陸斯恩、錫德與奧蒂莉亞，決定要傳承這個精神，於是再次組成了新的黑夜旅團。

在一次的任務中，查克一行人意外的拯救了一位精靈少女-多洛莉絲，獲救的精靈少女卻失去記憶，遠離精靈國度來到人族領地的舉動讓錫德產生了擔憂，但真正要讓黑夜旅團擔憂的事情才正要開始！


** 建議使用iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 第五代/iPad Pro或後續機種可以獲得更順暢的體驗**

《旋轉音律》是一款活用了手機陀螺儀功能的體感音樂遊戲。力求帶來前所未有的嶄新音樂遊戲體驗。 旋轉手機，感受在星河間穿梭的快感。帶上耳機，共赴鼓點與星光相伴宇宙之旅。

 =用體感，玩音樂= 
不同於傳統音遊的點按式判定，在《旋轉音律》中，你需要通過快速旋轉手機來完成部分音符的判定——就像駕駛賽車穿越急彎那樣。這將會是如同街機般爽快的音樂遊戲體驗。

 =夢與約定之地，愛與成長之旅= 
跟隨伊洛踏上宇宙之旅，追尋友人的足跡，邂逅不同星球的居民，拯救阿古亞星的命運。一路見證伊洛的成長吧！

-豐富的NPC互動玩法，結交五都俠客（侶），遊走於盤雜的人際勢力，經營你的江湖關係網。
-奇遇與危險並存的真實武林。江湖並非非黑即白，遇事不一定要用拳頭解決，可採取多種方式應對，並坦然接受不一樣的結局。
-充滿煙火氣息的像素武俠世界。遊戲中有著自然流逝的時間，各色NPC都有自己獨立的行為AI。

Made for concert and festival goers

- Live photos available

It is currently not possible to auto-disable the shutter sound of the camera when taking a photo. It is against the iOS Developer Program License Agreement.

It is against iOS Developer Program License Agreement to not have indications on the screen when taking a photo and/or video.

Facebook: 搜索 三國誌漢末霸業

【漢末霸業】基本介紹

【三國誌:漢末霸業】是由成都龍遊天下工作室精心制作的壹款回合制君主扮演模式的SLG遊戲。主要是以國人自己對三國遊戲的新思維，新角度來打造不壹樣的三國世界。在回歸傳統策略類的基礎上深度刻畫了三國各城市之間的地域差異以及每個武將自身能力和特性的異同，而在戰鬥方面突出結合天時地利人和的調配來進行作戰的魅力。


正式版遊戲特色：
壹：經典的白描繡像畫風，古樸典雅
人物頭像采用經典的《三國演義》連環畫的白描繡像畫風和上色。遊戲界面采用古風古韻設計，地道中國風。
二：簡單易上手的政務管理模式：
基礎的內政安排、人事探索、軍事偵察、技術開發都采用放置類管理模式，減少繁瑣的重復操作，讓玩家能聚焦其他事件。君主扮演模式，玩家只需要關註首都以及國家的管理。其他城市交給太守進行管理。使用方針給分城下達不同的軍政指令。

三：極其豐富的遊戲內容設定：
	超過1300名登場武將（包括歷史和演義武將）。 
	30項武將基本能力的細分化設計，更能體現武將之間的差異。
	超過300種以上的獨立配置的武將特性，全面凸顯武將個體差異。 
	超過500種有考據的物品寶物設定。多種分類劃分來滿足不同的喜好需求。
	近六十多個不同類型的城市，200多種有據可考的城市特征和特產。
	豐富的技術研究和開發項目，體現了科技對勢力發展的重要性。
	三大基本兵種和近二十種特殊兵種構成豐富的兵種體系。
	超豐富的官職系統。
	各種自然現象和事件災害模擬出多災多難的三國時期。 
	豐富的來訪事情，商人、仙人、名士、名醫、名匠、劍客遊走四方，引發各種功能事件。

四：回歸經典回合制，側重策略性排兵布陣的戰鬥系統
	天氣和地形、地塊高度的引入更加凸顯天時地利要素對戰爭的影響。
	野戰和攻城戰功能獨立分開。攻城有攻城車，霹靂車，井闌，守城有投石機、床弩、塞門刀車。更能凸顯攻守之間的平衡關系。

tw.description:
Inspect papers, prevent smuggling—keep the border safe or profit from corruption.

Ready to become a Border Police Officer? Step into the world of Black Border 2: Border Patrol Simulator and experience the intense pressure of national security. As a Customs Officer, your duty is to protect the nation from illegal smuggling. Inspect passports, scrutinize documents, and use advanced tools to make life-or-death decisions in this gripping police simulator game.

Take on the duty of a Border Patrol Agent and protect your nation's borders. Your role is crucial:

Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports, permits, and papers to approve or reject entrants.

Advanced Tools: Utilize X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and weigh stations to check vehicle legitimacy.

Canine Unit: Deploy your loyal service dog to sniff out concealed contraband and uncover secrets.

Strategic Decisions: Every choice you make impacts the safety of your country.

NEW FEATURES in Black Border 2:

Document Inspection: Meticulously check passports and permits to approve or reject entrants as a customs officer.

Endless Mode: Test your border patrol skills in a nonstop, challenging experience.

Bus Arrivals: Manage large buses and check every passenger's documents carefully.

Advanced Scanning: Utilize new X-ray scanners to reveal hidden items and contraband.

Weigh Stations: Ensure vehicle weights match their records, a key part of your police duty.

Canine Unit: Your faithful service dog is now a crucial partner in finding hidden contraband.

Each day as a border inspector brings new challenges that will push your customs police skills to the limit. Are you ready to face the pressure and become a true hero of national security?

Download Black Border 2 today and get ready to defend the nation!

tw.description:
BimmerLink is the direct link to your BMW or MINI. Using one of the supported OBD adapters, you can read trouble codes or display sensor values in realtime, check the current state of the DPF in your car or register a new battery after replacement. BimmerLink even allows you to remotely control the exhaust flap or mute the Active Sound Design in your car.

READ AND CLEAR TROUBLE CODES
Diagnose your car as would otherwise be possible only by your Service Partner. In contrast to generic OBD apps that read emission related errors only, BimmerLink allows you to read and clear trouble codes from ALL control units in your car.

DISPLAY REALTIME SENSOR VALUES
BimmerLink provides a big selection of values like oil temperature or boost pressure. Keep an eye on all the important parameters of your car with a personalized dashboard.

EXHAUST FLAP REMOTE CONTROL*
Take control over the exhaust flap in your car and decide yourself, whether it should be closed or open.

ACTIVE SOUND DESIGN**
If you do not like the artificial engine sound generated in your car, just mute the Active Sound Design with BimmerLink.

SOUND TUNING***
The “Sound Tuning” option allows you to disable the “exhaust burble“ in cars equipped with the S55 engine (M2 Competition, M3, M4).

DPF REGENERATION****
BimmerLink allows you to check the current state of the diesel particulate filter in your car. Find out when the last regeneration took place or how much ash has accumulated in the filter and start a regeneration with the touch of a button.

CARPLAY ADD-ON*****
Enhance your driving experience with the CarPlay add-on for BimmerLink. Access your sensor values on your car's display for improved vehicle monitoring, all integrated seamlessly with CarPlay for ease of use.

BATTERY REGISTRATION
If you want to replace the battery in your car, this has to be registered in the engine control unit and BimmerLink allows you to do this yourself now.

PARKING BRAKE SERVICE MODE
BimmerLink allows you to activate the service mode for the electromechanical parking brake.

SERVICE RESET
Reset the service display in your car after carrying out maintenance work like a brake pad replacement or an engine oil change.

RESET SHORT CIRCUIT LOCKS
Unlock lamp outputs that were disabled due to a short circuit.

TRANSMISSION ADAPTATION VALUES
Check the adaptation values of the ZF 8HP automatic transmission in your vehicle.

REQUIRED ACCESSORIES
To use the app, one of the supported Bluetooth or WiFi OBD adapters or cables is required. For more information please visit https://bimmerlink.app.

在屡获殊荣的棋盘游戏《沙丘：帝国》中，穿梭于地形险恶的厄拉科斯星球，体验策略与阴谋的终极融合！
"在线对战、与人工智能进行本地对战，或与强大的哈葛尔家族对战。
获得成就，展示你作为领袖的实力。

在这款备受赞誉的策略桌游中，规划并建设一座科学管理的现代化动物园，为保护项目提供支持。

你将在《Ark Nova》中规划和设计一座科学管理的现代化动物园。并向着“拥有最成功的动物园”的终极目标努力奋斗。你将建造饲养区、容纳动物并支持世界各地的保护项目，专家们和各种独特建筑将帮助你实现这一目标。

《Ark Nova》的核心要素是 255 张以动物、专家、独特饲养区与保护项目为主题的卡牌。每张卡牌都拥有特定能力，你可以利用它们来提高动物园的魅力和科学声望并收集保护点数。每位玩家都有一组行动卡牌，你可以通过使用和升级这些卡牌来实施你的计划。

每位玩家都可以使用一套五张行动卡牌来进行游戏，行动的强度由卡牌当前占据的槽位决定。这些卡牌是：

建造：允许你建造标准/特殊饲养区、贩售亭与休憩亭。

动物：允许你在自己的动物园中容纳动物。

卡牌：允许你获得新动物园卡牌（动物、赞助商以及保护项目卡牌）。

协会：允许你的协会事务员完成不同任务。

赞助商：允许你在自己的动物园中打出一张赞助商卡牌或获得钱币。

《Ark Nova》拥有极高的可玩性和丰富的组件，可提供不同凡响的游戏体验，让玩家无数次体验游戏的乐趣。

tw.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

us.description:
Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest!

Your honorable quest is to save the world!

The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic!

Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology!

Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean.

It’s all or nothing on your glorious path!

With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures!

What are you waiting for?

Like no other game in the Action RPG genre, Titan Quest: Legendary Edition combines the fascinating world of mythology with endless and exciting action that you would expect from such a compelling game!

Features:
+ Within the world of the Immortal Throne DLC, you’ll encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx. You have to interpret the prophecies of the blind seer Tiresias, fight alongside Agamemnon and Achilles, and use the wiles of Odysseus to conquer this dark new adventure.

+ In the uncharted lands of northern Europe in the Ragnarök DLC, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!

+ Meet an explorer in the Atlantis DLC, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. A key is supposedly hidden in the diary of Herakles, which is rumored to be located in the Phoenician City of Gadir. Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!

+ All important updates have been implemented to the technically overhauled Titan Quest to grant the best gaming experience of this classic ever!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs available as in-app purchase - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

! A note for all players who own the base version of Titan Quest: The DLCs mentioned here are also available for purchase as additional content so that all fans can upgrade their game to fully enjoy all expansions!

© www.handy-games.com GmbH

us.description:
A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure!
Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat.

[Game Features]
◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences
Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies!

◆ Traditional JRPG experience
In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II!

◆ Substitute Heroes
Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle!

◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles
Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience!

◆ More equipment
Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes'  weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities!

◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power
A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm!

◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free


A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History
A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers.

One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom...

** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

The best interactive app for learning musculoskeletal anatomy. 

AnatomyMapp® combines an empowering collection of study tools for the popular Trail Guide to the Body—a best-selling musculoskeletal anatomy textbook—into a single interactive app! It's great for not only reinforcing your textbook learning but also for studying while on the bus, having a snack, or pretty much wherever you have your phone.
 
AnatomyMapp® includes information from all 362 Trail Guide to the Body Flashcards; questions from the Trail Guide to the Body Student Workbook; and easy search and bookmarking capabilities:

• Test your musculoskeletal anatomy knowledge by (1) answering multiple choice question (muscle cards only); (2) locating specific structures; or (3) identifying actions, origins, insertions, and nerve innervations (AOIN).

• Bookmark specific cards to review later and use enhanced navigation features for bookmarked cards.

• Apply the easy search function to choose all cards or only cards you’ve bookmarked.

• Find additional information in the Trail Guide to the Body textbook with page references on each card.

• Zoom into cards to enhance your view of the illustrations.

• Learn correct pronunciation using the app’s audio pronunciation.
 
Designed to be viewed in portrait mode. 
 
If you have any comments or suggestions, we’d like to hear from you at info@booksofdiscovery.com.
 
More than 2,000 manual therapy programs have chosen Trail Guide to the Body products for their students. The textbook is sold in nearly 40 countries.

Rotaeno is a heart-pounding, thumb-tapping, wrist-flicking rhythm game that fully utilizes your device's gyroscope for an unprecedented musical experience.
Rotate your device to hit notes as you soar through the stars. Drop into your headphones and immerse yourself in the kick beats and stellar synths of this astronautical adventure!

What sets Rotaeno apart is all in the name - rotation! Building on the basic controls of more traditional rhythm games, Rotaeno includes notes that require smooth turns and rapid rotations to hit, making it feel like you're drifting in a highspeed interstellar stunt race. us.description:
Hero's Adventure is an open-world Wuxia RPG developed by Half Amateur Studio.You will commence your journey as an underdog in the tumultuous Martial World and will be met with a wide array of choices as you navigate your own heroic saga.

Game Features

[Unexpected Encounters Await]
Throughout your journey, you will run into scripted and unexpected encounters. Perhaps you'll cross paths with an ambitious lieutenant amidst a power struggle at a humble inn, or you’ll run into a retired kung fu master in a nameless village. These will be the experiences you will learn to expect in the ever-changing Jianghu.

Beware, each encounter might associate and change your relationship with the 30+ factions involved in the power struggle in this chaotic Martial World. And remember: every choice you make, every person you befriend (or offend), and every faction you engage will leave a mark.

[Become the Master of Martial Arts]
Whether you're decoding ancient techniques off a forgotten scroll, or prefer training with a battle-hardened warrior, there’s no correct solution for mastering martial arts. Choose from a variety of weapon types and explore 300+ martial arts skills, the Jianghu will be yours to conquer.

[Explore a Living, Breathing World]
In this Wuxia simulator, you'll get to explore 80 cities and villages that bring wuxia to life. Witness how villagers go about their daily routines, and experience the rhythms of ancient Chinese cities.

[Craft Your Narrative]
To provide an experience where you can embody your own martial spirit, Hero’s Adventure has over 10 distinct endings. Whether you choose to be a noble swordsman, a guardian of the nation, or an agent of chaos, you'll find an ending that aligns with your chosen path in Hero's Adventure.

小时候，我以为自己是不会老去的彼得·潘，却终究敌不过健康磨损，容颜老去。
时针转动，生命流逝，但每一次心跳都可以更加有力。

有时候，生命只是一连串的数字，多少年，多少月，多少小时，多少分钟。当你意识到这个时，往往陷入巨大的虚无感之中，惶恐不能自拔。
而现在，这些数字可以成为你重塑生命的坐标，指引你走向更健康、更长久的未来。

生辰 2.0 通过 AI 分析和科学判断，不仅预测生命的终点，更为你铺就延长生命的道路：

- 探索你的生命时钟：了解当下的预期寿命，直面生命的有限与珍贵。
- 发现延寿的可能：看见改变健康习惯能为你带来多少额外的生命时光。
- 聚合健康数据：自动追踪睡眠、锻炼、压力（HRV）、经期、喝水等十余种健康数据

美国诗人纳·斯待尔在87岁那年写道：
"如果我能够从头活过，我会试着犯更多的错。
我会放松一点，我会灵活一点。
我会爬更多的山，游更多的河，看更多的日落。"

因为了解生命的终点，才能更好地珍惜当下的每一刻。生辰2.0 探索健康的可能，让我们成为你健康旅程的长久伙伴。

Requirements of The Last Warlord:
To ensure the game's normal operation, it is required that iOS version should be higher than iOS Version 16 and use iPhone X or X Plus, iPhone 12 or above, or iPad Air 2, iPad mini 4, iPad 2017 or any iPad Pro to run the game. 

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/threekingdomsthelastwarlord
Forum: https://steamcommunity.com/app/577230/discussions/1/

Three Kingdoms: The Last Warlord is a turn-based lord-playing strategy game developed by the Chengdu Longyou Studio. The studio created this game world set in the period of the Three Kingdoms mainly based on people's opinions on other games set in that period. The game is very detailed in depicting the differences between various cities and also the abilities and features of the military officers. The game also applies an appealing battle system in which weather, landforms, and many other factors will influence the result of each battle.
The game is based on the famous Chinese historical novel by Luo Guanzhong (about A.D. 1330 - 1400). 

I. Simple and graceful graphics finished by fine-lined drawing
The portrait of every character in the game is finished by fine-lined drawing with the same style as the picture-story books "Romance of the Three Kingdoms". All interfaces of the game are designed in a typical Chinese style.

II. The governing modes are easy to get started with:
There are easy governing modes in the game so that players can manage various affairs easily and spend more time enjoying its other facets. Due to the game's lord-playing mode, players do not need to pay much attention to cities besides their own capital. Instead, they can order prefects to govern other cities and later on give them commands when necessary.

III. A rich variety of gameplay and contents
Over 1,300 officers are available in the game (including those recorded in historical books and novels).
There are up to 30 attributes for officers.
Over 300 features of officers are available.
Over 500 kinds of verified precious items have been applied to the game world for players of different preferences to choose from.
Over 60 cities of different styles and 200 features of cities are available.
There are also abundant techs research and development items.
Its system of combat units contains three main kinds of combat units and about 20 kinds of special combat units.
Ultra abundant official positions.
Numerous simulated natural phenomena, incidents and disasters will highly represent the calamitous period of the Three Kingdoms.
Travelling around will trigger various incidents. 

IV. The turn-based battle mode requires careful planning in deploying troops
Weather, landforms, and even the height of the battlefield will influence any battles in the game.
There's also a siege mechanism with a great gaming environment. There are various siege vehicles for players to storm castles and also defending their own castles. 

V. Other functions
There are also other functions available in the game.
Cloud Save
Steam Cards
The achievement system allows players to collect and show off achievements.

us.description:
BimmerLink is the direct link to your BMW or MINI. Using one of the supported OBD adapters, you can read trouble codes or display sensor values in realtime, check the current state of the DPF in your car or register a new battery after replacement. BimmerLink even allows you to remotely control the exhaust flap or mute the Active Sound Design in your car.

READ AND CLEAR TROUBLE CODES
Diagnose your car as would otherwise be possible only by your Service Partner. In contrast to generic OBD apps that read emission related errors only, BimmerLink allows you to read and clear trouble codes from ALL control units in your car.

DISPLAY REALTIME SENSOR VALUES
BimmerLink provides a big selection of values like oil temperature or boost pressure. Keep an eye on all the important parameters of your car with a personalized dashboard.

EXHAUST FLAP REMOTE CONTROL*
Take control over the exhaust flap in your car and decide yourself, whether it should be closed or open.

ACTIVE SOUND DESIGN**
If you do not like the artificial engine sound generated in your car, just mute the Active Sound Design with BimmerLink.

SOUND TUNING***
The “Sound Tuning” option allows you to disable the “exhaust burble“ in cars equipped with the S55 engine (M2 Competition, M3, M4).

DPF REGENERATION****
BimmerLink allows you to check the current state of the diesel particulate filter in your car. Find out when the last regeneration took place or how much ash has accumulated in the filter and start a regeneration with the touch of a button.

CARPLAY ADD-ON*****
Enhance your driving experience with the CarPlay add-on for BimmerLink. Access your sensor values on your car's display for improved vehicle monitoring, all integrated seamlessly with CarPlay for ease of use.

BATTERY REGISTRATION
If you want to replace the battery in your car, this has to be registered in the engine control unit and BimmerLink allows you to do this yourself now.

PARKING BRAKE SERVICE MODE
BimmerLink allows you to activate the service mode for the electromechanical parking brake.

SERVICE RESET
Reset the service display in your car after carrying out maintenance work like a brake pad replacement or an engine oil change.

RESET SHORT CIRCUIT LOCKS
Unlock lamp outputs that were disabled due to a short circuit.

TRANSMISSION ADAPTATION VALUES
Check the adaptation values of the ZF 8HP automatic transmission in your vehicle.

REQUIRED ACCESSORIES
To use the app, one of the supported Bluetooth or WiFi OBD adapters or cables is required. For more information please visit https://bimmerlink.app.

SUPPORTED CARS
- 1 Series (2004+)
- 2 Series, M2 (2013+)
- 2 Series Active Tourer (2014+)

us.description:
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

Titan Quest has captivated legions of players since its 2006 debut. You get the all-encompassing experience of an unbridled, truly heroic journey through the worlds of Titan Quest!

Your honorable quest is to save the world!

The gods alone cannot defeat the Titans, so real heroes are needed - and that can only be you! Your success or failure will decide the fate of the people and the Olympians! With your custom-created hero, scour the mystical and ancient worlds of Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China. Conquer the hordes of legendary creatures and master various weapons and martial arts: Archery, sword fighting, or the use of powerful magic!

Travel a world of antiquity and Nordic mythology!

Battle the beasts of mythology as you travel to the Parthenon, the Great Pyramids, the Hanging Gardens of Babylon, the Great Wall, the Tartarus Arena, and other famous places. Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, discover the uncharted lands of northern Europe, search for the mythical kingdom of Atlantis, and set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean.

It’s all or nothing on your glorious path!

With each challenge that awaits you, you'll have to defeat bigger and stronger enemies until you reach your goal and force the Titans to their knees! Rush into battle alongside brave pet companions! Find extraordinary items with special powers that will enhance your abilities and help you on your path. Legendary swords, powerful lightning spells, magical, bows and numerous other treasures with unimaginable powers await you - all of them are at your disposal in your battles and spread fear and terror among the hideous creatures!

What are you waiting for?

tr.description:
A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure!
Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat.

[Game Features]
◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences
Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies!

◆ Traditional JRPG experience
In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II!

◆ Substitute Heroes
Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle!

◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles
Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience!

◆ More equipment
Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes'  weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities!

◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power
A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm!

◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free


A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History
A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers.

One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom...

** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

tr.description:
Hero's Adventure is an open-world Wuxia RPG developed by Half Amateur Studio.You will commence your journey as an underdog in the tumultuous Martial World and will be met with a wide array of choices as you navigate your own heroic saga.

Game Features

[Unexpected Encounters Await]
Throughout your journey, you will run into scripted and unexpected encounters. Perhaps you'll cross paths with an ambitious lieutenant amidst a power struggle at a humble inn, or you’ll run into a retired kung fu master in a nameless village. These will be the experiences you will learn to expect in the ever-changing Jianghu.

Beware, each encounter might associate and change your relationship with the 30+ factions involved in the power struggle in this chaotic Martial World. And remember: every choice you make, every person you befriend (or offend), and every faction you engage will leave a mark.

[Become the Master of Martial Arts]
Whether you're decoding ancient techniques off a forgotten scroll, or prefer training with a battle-hardened warrior, there’s no correct solution for mastering martial arts. Choose from a variety of weapon types and explore 300+ martial arts skills, the Jianghu will be yours to conquer.

[Explore a Living, Breathing World]
In this Wuxia simulator, you'll get to explore 80 cities and villages that bring wuxia to life. Witness how villagers go about their daily routines, and experience the rhythms of ancient Chinese cities.

[Craft Your Narrative]
To provide an experience where you can embody your own martial spirit, Hero’s Adventure has over 10 distinct endings. Whether you choose to be a noble swordsman, a guardian of the nation, or an agent of chaos, you'll find an ending that aligns with your chosen path in Hero's Adventure.

tr.description:
Requirements of The Last Warlord:
To ensure the game's normal operation, it is required that iOS version should be higher than iOS Version 16 and use iPhone X or X Plus, iPhone 12 or above, or iPad Air 2, iPad mini 4, iPad 2017 or any iPad Pro to run the game. 

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/threekingdomsthelastwarlord
Forum: https://steamcommunity.com/app/577230/discussions/1/

Three Kingdoms: The Last Warlord is a turn-based lord-playing strategy game developed by the Chengdu Longyou Studio. The studio created this game world set in the period of the Three Kingdoms mainly based on people's opinions on other games set in that period. The game is very detailed in depicting the differences between various cities and also the abilities and features of the military officers. The game also applies an appealing battle system in which weather, landforms, and many other factors will influence the result of each battle.
The game is based on the famous Chinese historical novel by Luo Guanzhong (about A.D. 1330 - 1400). 

I. Simple and graceful graphics finished by fine-lined drawing
The portrait of every character in the game is finished by fine-lined drawing with the same style as the picture-story books "Romance of the Three Kingdoms". All interfaces of the game are designed in a typical Chinese style.

II. The governing modes are easy to get started with:
There are easy governing modes in the game so that players can manage various affairs easily and spend more time enjoying its other facets. Due to the game's lord-playing mode, players do not need to pay much attention to cities besides their own capital. Instead, they can order prefects to govern other cities and later on give them commands when necessary.

III. A rich variety of gameplay and contents
Over 1,300 officers are available in the game (including those recorded in historical books and novels).
There are up to 30 attributes for officers.
Over 300 features of officers are available.
Over 500 kinds of verified precious items have been applied to the game world for players of different preferences to choose from.
Over 60 cities of different styles and 200 features of cities are available.
There are also abundant techs research and development items.
Its system of combat units contains three main kinds of combat units and about 20 kinds of special combat units.
Ultra abundant official positions.
Numerous simulated natural phenomena, incidents and disasters will highly represent the calamitous period of the Three Kingdoms.
Travelling around will trigger various incidents. 

IV. The turn-based battle mode requires careful planning in deploying troops
Weather, landforms, and even the height of the battlefield will influence any battles in the game.
There's also a siege mechanism with a great gaming environment. There are various siege vehicles for players to storm castles and also defending their own castles. 

V. Other functions
There are also other functions available in the game.
Cloud Save
Steam Cards
The achievement system allows players to collect and show off achievements.

tr.description:
BimmerLink is the direct link to your BMW or MINI. Using one of the supported OBD adapters, you can read trouble codes or display sensor values in realtime, check the current state of the DPF in your car or register a new battery after replacement. BimmerLink even allows you to remotely control the exhaust flap or mute the Active Sound Design in your car.

READ AND CLEAR TROUBLE CODES
Diagnose your car as would otherwise be possible only by your Service Partner. In contrast to generic OBD apps that read emission related errors only, BimmerLink allows you to read and clear trouble codes from ALL control units in your car.

DISPLAY REALTIME SENSOR VALUES
BimmerLink provides a big selection of values like oil temperature or boost pressure. Keep an eye on all the important parameters of your car with a personalized dashboard.

EXHAUST FLAP REMOTE CONTROL*
Take control over the exhaust flap in your car and decide yourself, whether it should be closed or open.

ACTIVE SOUND DESIGN**
If you do not like the artificial engine sound generated in your car, just mute the Active Sound Design with BimmerLink.

SOUND TUNING***
The “Sound Tuning” option allows you to disable the “exhaust burble“ in cars equipped with the S55 engine (M2 Competition, M3, M4).

DPF REGENERATION****
BimmerLink allows you to check the current state of the diesel particulate filter in your car. Find out when the last regeneration took place or how much ash has accumulated in the filter and start a regeneration with the touch of a button.

CARPLAY ADD-ON*****
Enhance your driving experience with the CarPlay add-on for BimmerLink. Access your sensor values on your car's display for improved vehicle monitoring, all integrated seamlessly with CarPlay for ease of use.

BATTERY REGISTRATION
If you want to replace the battery in your car, this has to be registered in the engine control unit and BimmerLink allows you to do this yourself now.

PARKING BRAKE SERVICE MODE
BimmerLink allows you to activate the service mode for the electromechanical parking brake.

SERVICE RESET
Reset the service display in your car after carrying out maintenance work like a brake pad replacement or an engine oil change.

RESET SHORT CIRCUIT LOCKS
Unlock lamp outputs that were disabled due to a short circuit.

TRANSMISSION ADAPTATION VALUES
Check the adaptation values of the ZF 8HP automatic transmission in your vehicle.

REQUIRED ACCESSORIES
To use the app, one of the supported Bluetooth or WiFi OBD adapters or cables is required. For more information please visit https://bimmerlink.app.

SUPPORTED CARS
- 1 Series (2004+)
- 2 Series, M2 (2013+)
- 2 Series Active Tourer (2014+)
- 2 Series Gran Tourer (2015+)
- 3 Series, M3 (2005+)
- 4 Series, M4 (2013+)
- 5 Series, M5 (2003+)
- 6 Series, M6 (2003+)
- 7 Series (2008+)
- 8 Series (2018+)

Henry was the lead animator at Joey Drew Studios in its 1930s heyday, a studio that was best known for producing animated cartoons of their most popular and beloved character, Bendy. Many years later Henry receives a mysterious invitation from Joey Drew himself to return to the old cartoon workshop. Journey deep into the sketchy madness of this twisted cartoon nightmare. 

Fight the darkness. Escape the Ink Demon. Fear the Machine.

tr.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of Dune. 

Experience the ultimate blend of strategy and intrigue as you navigate the treacherous landscapes of Arrakis in the award-winning board game Dune: Imperium!

Battle online, locally with AI, or against the formidable House Hagal.

Earn Achievements that showcase your prowess as a leader.

Embark on more than a dozen Challenges that will test your wit and cunning.

Compete for badges in the rotating Skirmish Mode where no two games are the same!

Control the Spice. Control the Universe.

Arrakis. Dune. Desert Planet. Raise your banner above the vast wasteland before you. As the Great Houses of the Landsraad marshal their forces and their spies, whom will you influence, and whom will you betray? A tyrannical Emperor. The secretive Bene Gesserit. The shrewd Spacing Guild. The ferocious Fremen of the Deep Desert. The power of the Imperium can be yours, but war is not the only way to claim it.

Dune: Imperium blends deck-building and worker placement in a deeply thematic new strategy game where the fate of the Empire hangs on your decisions. Will you seek political allies or rely upon military might? Economic strength or subtle intrigues? A council seat… or a sharpened blade? The cards are dealt. The choice is yours. The Imperium awaits.

tr.description:
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects in an acclaimed strategy board game.

In Ark Nova, you will plan and design a modern, scientifically managed zoo. With the ultimate goal of owning the most successful zoological establishment, you will build enclosures, accommodate animals, and support conservation projects all over the world. Specialists and unique buildings will help you in achieving this goal. 

At the heart of Ark Nova are 255 cards featuring animals, specialists, unique enclosures, and conservation projects, each with a particular ability. Use them to increase the appeal and scientific reputation of your zoo and to collect conservation points. Each player has a set of action cards, which you will use and upgrade to carry out your plans.

Each player has a set of five action cards to manage their gameplay, and the power of an action is determined by the slot the card currently occupies. The cards are:

BUILD: Allows you to build standard or special enclosures, kiosks, and pavilions.

ANIMALS: Allows you to accommodate animals in your zoo.

CARDS: Allows you to gain new zoo cards (animals, sponsors, and conservation project cards).

ASSOCIATION: Allows your association workers to carry out different tasks.

SPONSORS: Allows you to play a sponsor card in your zoo or to raise money.

With high replayability and rich components, Ark Nova provides a remarkable gaming experience that will bring the game to the table again and again.

tr.description:
Play the digital adaptation of the beloved tabletop board game. Root is a game of adventure and war where 2 to 4 players battle for control of a vast wilderness.

The nefarious Marquise de Cat has seized the great woodland, intent on harvesting its riches. Under her rule, the many creatures of the forest have banded together. This Alliance will seek to strengthen its resources and subvert the rule of Cats. In this effort, the Alliance may enlist the help of the wandering Vagabonds who are able to move through the more dangerous woodland paths. Though some may sympathize with the Alliance’s hopes and dreams, these wanderers are old enough to remember the great birds of prey who once controlled the woods.

Meanwhile, at the edge of the region, the proud, squabbling Eyrie have found a new commander who they hope will lead their faction to resume their ancient birthright.

The stage is set for a contest that will decide the fate of the great woodland. It is up to the players to decide which group will ultimately take root.

tr.description:
【Game Introduction】
'Call of Knights' is an RPG card pixel-style game developed by Olive Panda Studio. It is divided into two parts: 'Song of the Knight' and 'Shining Stars,' each offering unique gameplay and content. The game adopts paid download, in-app purchase to unlock model to access all gameplay content.

【In-App Purchases Unlock】
Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD
Story Mode of Song of the Knight: $4.99 USD
Free Mode of Shining Stars: $4.99 USD
Both modes support experiencing before paying for unlocking. 'Song of the Knight' can be experienced for free until the end of the second chapter, and 'Shining Stars' offers free gameplay for one year. 
Note: The amounts will be converted based on the local exchange rate.

'Song of the Knight':
The story is adapted from the Nobel Prize-winning author Henrik Hien's 'The Knights of the Cross.' The main gameplay involves RPG role-playing with cards, incorporating a partner skill combo system during card battles. Different cards played release exclusive skills, constructing various playstyles. Players will also meet and recruit numerous companions, embarking on an epic journey.

'Shining Stars':
The game is set in a magical continent called Antana, featuring six countries with diverse customs. Players take on the role of a small lord in one of the kingdoms. As the demonic realm is about to invade the continent, players must travel far and wide to find companions for their knightly order, establish their own knightly order, embark on adventures, strengthen their abilities, and defend the human frontlines.

【Device Support】

· Operating memory of 3GB and above
· iPhone 7 and above
· iPad Air 3 and above

If you need assistance during the game or encounter issues, feel free to contact us via email.

RULE YOUR TOWN, BUILD YOUR CITY, BALANCE YOUR RESOURCES!
Swipe each card with one finger, become mayor, make bold decisions, please your people and carve your own reign into history!

Mayor Card fuses classic city-management simulation with lightning-fast swipe-card action to create a fresh strategy deck-builder. Drag every card left or right; collect taxes, protect nature, grow population and keep every resource bar alive. pt.description:
O Titan Quest cativou legiões de jogadores desde a sua estreia em 2006. Tu recebes a experiência abrangente de uma jornada desenfreada e verdadeiramente heróica pelos mundos de Titan Quest!

A tua honrosa missão é salvar o mundo!

Sozinhos, os deuses sozinhos não conseguem derrotar os Titãs. Por isso, são necessários heróis reais - e só podes ser tu! O teu sucesso ou fracasso decidirá o destino do povo e dos Olympians! Percorre os mundos místicos e antigos da Grécia, Egito, Babilónia e China com o teu herói personalizado. Conquista as hordas de criaturas lendárias e domina várias armas e artes marciais: tiro com arco, luta de espadas ou o uso de magia poderosa!

Viaja por um mundo de antiguidade e mitologia nórdica!

Luta contra as feras da mitologia enquanto viajas para o Partenon, as Grandes Pirâmides, os Jardins Suspensos da Babilónia, a Grande Muralha, a Arena do Tártaro e outros lugares famosos. Encontra os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, descobre as terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa, procura o reino mítico da Atlântida e faz uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental.

É tudo ou nada no teu caminho glorioso!

A cada desafio que te espera, terás que derrotar inimigos maiores e mais fortes até atingires o teu objetivo e forçar os Titãs a ajoelharem! Corre para a batalha ao lado de bravos companheiros de estimação! Encontra itens extraordinários com poderes especiais que irão melhorar as tuas capacidades e ajudar-te no teu caminho. Espadas lendárias, feitiços de relâmpagos poderosos, magia, arcos e vários outros tesouros com poderes inimagináveis esperam por ti - todos eles estão à tua disposição nas tuas batalhas e espalham medo e terror entre as criaturas horríveis!

De que estás à espera?

Como nenhum outro jogo no género RPG de ação, o Titan Quest: Edição Lendária combina o fascinante mundo da mitologia com a ação interminável e emocionante que esperas de um jogo tão atraente!

Características principais:

- No DLC do Trono Imortal, encontrarás os maiores vilões da mitologia grega, enfrentarás os ataques de Cerberus e arriscarás as margens do Rio Styx. Deves interpretar as profecias do vidente cego Tirésias, lutar ao lado de Agamenon e Aquiles e usar os ardis de Odisseu para conquistar esta nova aventura sombria.

- Nas terras desconhecidas do norte da Europa no Ragnarök DLC, enfrentarás os reinos dos celtas, dos homens do norte e dos deuses Asgardianos!

- Conhece um explorador no DLC Atlantis, em busca do reino mítico da Atlântida. Uma chave está supostamente escondida no diário de Hércules, que dizem estar localizado na cidade fenícia de Gadir. Começa uma jornada pelo Mediterrâneo Ocidental, incluindo a Arena do Tártaro para batalhas épicas!

+ Todas as atualizações importantes foram implementadas no Titan Quest revisto tecnicamente para garantir a melhor experiência de jogo deste clássico de todos os tempos!

+ ETERNAL EMBERS DLCs disponíveis como compra in-app - Invocado pelo lendário Imperador Yao, o Herói é chamado de volta ao Leste para lidar com uma ameaça demoníaca que está devastando a terra depois que o Telkine foi morto.

+ Uma nota para todos os jogadores que possuem a versão básica do Titan Quest: Os DLCs mencionados aqui também serão lançados para compra como conteúdo adicional para que todos os fãs possam atualizar os seus jogos para desfrutarem todas as expansões!
